entry.title: Audio Enhancer
entry.description: Audio Enhancer is a free online tool for improving audio clarity, removing noise, and enhancing voice recordings.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free use for audio enhancement with basic features.
caveats: Processing time may vary with file size

useCases: Remove background noise from audio files
Clean up lecture or meeting recordings
quickstartSteps: Go to the Audio Enhancer website.
Upload your audio file (mp3, wav, or m4a, up to 50MB).
Select enhancement options if available.
Click 'Enhance' to process your audio.
Download the improved audio file.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need to quickly improve audio quality or remove noise from voice recordings without installing software.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced editing, batch processing, or need to process files larger than 50MB.
entry.body: Audio Enhancer is a free, browser-based tool that lets users quickly clean up and improve the quality of audio files, especially voice recordings. It is ideal for students, podcasters, and indie creators who need simple, no-install audio enhancement. The service supports common audio formats and is easy to use, but does not offer advanced editing or batch processing capabilities.

entry.title: Azure Media Services
entry.description: Azure Media Services provides cloud-based encoding, streaming, and content protection for video and audio workflows.

freeTierDetails.summary: Includes 20 encoding output minutes, 5 streaming units, and 100 GB streaming per month.
caveats: Charges apply for usage above free limits.
Some advanced features may not be included in free tier.
billingRiskNotes: Overages are billed automatically if limits are exceeded.

quickstartSteps: Sign in to the Azure portal and create a Media Services account.
Set up a storage account for your media assets.
Upload a video file to your storage account.
Create an encoding job to process your video.
Publish the output asset and obtain a streaming URL.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need scalable video encoding, streaming, or DRM for web or mobile applications without managing infrastructure.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require a completely free solution for high-volume streaming or need on-premises media processing.
entry.body: Azure Media Services offers cloud-based video encoding, streaming, and content protection with a limited free tier suitable for testing and small workloads.

entry.title: Befonts
entry.description: Befonts offers a curated collection of free fonts for personal and commercial design projects.

freeTierDetails.summary: Access and download thousands of free fonts for personal and some commercial use.
caveats: Some fonts are for personal use only
Commercial use may require attribution or separate license

useCases: Finding unique fonts for design projects
quickstartSteps: Go to https://befonts.com/
Browse or search for desired font styles.
Check the license details for each font.
Click 'Download' to get the font files.
Install the font on your device for use in design tools.
entry.whenToUse: Use Befonts when you need free fonts for design projects and want a wide selection without registration.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require fonts with guaranteed commercial licenses or need advanced font management features.
entry.body: Befonts provides a large, curated selection of free fonts suitable for personal and some commercial design projects, with easy browsing and download.

entry.title: Bunny Fonts
entry.description: Bunny Fonts offers fast, privacy-focused, and open-source web font hosting with a global CDN.

freeTierDetails.summary: Completely free, unlimited access to all fonts and CDN bandwidth.

useCases: Improving site performance with CDN fonts
Replacing Google Fonts for GDPR compliance
quickstartSteps: Visit https://fonts.bunny.net and browse available fonts.
Select desired font and copy the provided embed link.
Paste the embed link into your website's HTML <head> section.
Reference the font in your CSS using the specified font-family.
entry.whenToUse: Use Bunny Fonts when you need fast, privacy-friendly, and free web font hosting for open-source fonts.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require custom or commercial fonts, or advanced font management features.
entry.body: Bunny Fonts provides a free, privacy-first alternative to Google Fonts, delivering open-source web fonts globally via a fast CDN.

entry.title: Dafont
entry.description: Dafont offers a large collection of free downloadable fonts for personal and non-commercial use.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free access to thousands of fonts for personal use.
limits: Commercial use may require separate license
caveats: Check individual font licenses for commercial use

quickstartSteps: Visit https://www.dafont.com/
Browse or search for a font by category or name.
Click 'Download' on the desired font.
Extract the downloaded ZIP file.
Install the font on your system for use in design software.
entry.whenToUse: Use Dafont when you need free fonts for personal or non-commercial design projects and want a wide selection.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Dafont if you require fonts with clear commercial licenses or need support for enterprise-level font management.
entry.body: Dafont provides a vast collection of free fonts suitable for personal and non-commercial design projects, with easy browsing and downloading.

entry.title: DB Designer
entry.description: DB Designer is a web-based tool for visually designing and sharing database schemas collaboratively.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows basic database diagramming with limited projects and tables.
caveats: No export to SQL in free plan

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free DB Designer account.
Create a new project from the dashboard.
Add tables and define fields visually.
Invite collaborators if needed.
Save and share your schema diagram.
entry.whenToUse: Use DB Designer for quick, visual database schema design and lightweight collaboration on small projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced features, large schemas, or SQL export capabilities in the free plan.
entry.body: DB Designer offers a free, browser-based environment for visually creating and sharing simple database schemas, ideal for learning and prototyping.

entry.title: DrawDB
entry.description: DrawDB lets you visually design database schemas and export diagrams for multiple database engines.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier allows unlimited public diagrams and limited private diagrams.
caveats: Private diagrams limited to 2 on free tier
No team collaboration features in free tier

quickstartSteps: Go to https://drawdb.app/ and sign up for a free account.
Create a new diagram and select your target database engine.
Drag and drop tables, fields, and relationships onto the canvas.
Export your diagram as SQL, PNG, or SVG as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use DrawDB when you need to quickly design, visualize, or share database schemas without installing software.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced team collaboration, unlimited private diagrams, or offline access.
entry.body: DrawDB is a web-based tool for visually designing and exporting database schemas, ideal for quick prototyping and documentation with a generous free tier.

entry.title: Everything Fonts
entry.description: Everything Fonts offers free and paid tools for font conversion, font identification, and web font hosting.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes basic font conversion and limited web font hosting.
limits: Up to 5 font conversions per day
caveats: API access is limited on free tier

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Everything Fonts account.
Upload your font file for conversion or identification.
Select the desired output format or identification option.
Download the converted font or view identification results.
For web font hosting, upload your font and copy the provided embed code.
entry.whenToUse: Use Everything Fonts for quick font conversions, basic font identification, or simple web font hosting without complex setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need bulk conversions, advanced font management, or high-traffic web font hosting for large-scale production sites.
entry.body: Everything Fonts provides essential tools for font conversion, identification, and web font hosting, suitable for designers and developers needing quick, basic font services.

entry.title: Font of web
entry.description: Font of web provides free web font hosting and CDN delivery for popular open-source fonts.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free access to open-source web fonts via CDN.
caveats: No support for custom or commercial fonts

quickstartSteps: Visit https://fontofweb.com/ and search for your desired font.
Copy the provided CDN link for the font style you want.
Paste the link into your website's <head> section.
Reference the font in your CSS using the specified font-family.
entry.whenToUse: Use when you need fast, free hosting for open-source web fonts without bandwidth or usage restrictions.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require custom, commercial, or self-hosted fonts, or need enterprise-grade SLAs.
entry.body: Font of web offers a simple, always-free CDN for open-source web fonts, making it easy to add typography to any website without bandwidth or usage limits. Ideal for students, indie developers, and open-source projects, it requires no signup or payment. However, it does not support custom or commercial fonts and does not provide enterprise-level guarantees.

entry.title: Font Squirrel
entry.description: Font Squirrel offers free, hand-picked, commercial-use fonts and a webfont generator for designers and developers.

freeTierDetails.summary: Access to free, commercial-use fonts and webfont generator.
limits: All fonts are free for commercial use
caveats: Some fonts may have additional licensing terms
Generated webfonts are for self-hosting only

useCases: Finding commercial-use fonts for design projects
quickstartSteps: Visit the Font Squirrel website.
Browse or search for a font that fits your project.
Check the license to confirm commercial use is allowed.
Download the font files or use the Webfont Generator to convert your own font.
Integrate the font into your design or website.
entry.whenToUse: Use Font Squirrel when you need free, commercial-use fonts or to generate webfonts for your website or design project.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require premium, exclusive, or custom fonts, or need advanced font management and hosting features.
avoidIf: you need premium or custom fonts
entry.body: Font Squirrel is a popular resource for designers and developers seeking free, commercial-use fonts and a simple webfont generator. All fonts are hand-picked for quality and licensing, making it easy to find safe-to-use typefaces for both personal and commercial projects. The webfont generator allows you to convert fonts for web use, ensuring compatibility and performance. No account or payment is required, but users should always check individual font licenses for any specific restrictions.

entry.title: FontGet
entry.description: FontGet offers free web font hosting and downloads for personal and commercial projects.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free access to a large library of downloadable and embeddable fonts.
caveats: Attribution may be required for some fonts

quickstartSteps: Visit https://www.fontget.com/.
Search or browse for a desired font.
Click on a font to view details and download options.
Download the font files or copy the web embed code.
Add the font files to your project or embed via HTML/CSS.
entry.whenToUse: Use FontGet when you need free, ready-to-use fonts for web or design projects without licensing hassles.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require custom font hosting, advanced font management, or guaranteed uptime for critical production sites.
entry.body: FontGet provides a large selection of free fonts for download and web embedding, suitable for personal and commercial use with minimal setup.

entry.title: Fontsensei
entry.description: Fontsensei offers free web font hosting and optimization for fast, privacy-friendly font delivery.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free font hosting and delivery with privacy-focused CDN.

quickstartSteps: Visit https://fontsensei.com/ and search for your desired font.
Copy the provided embed code for the font.
Paste the embed code into your website's HTML <head> section.
Reference the font in your CSS using the specified font-family.
entry.whenToUse: Use Fontsensei when you need fast, privacy-friendly hosting for open-source web fonts without bandwidth or request limits.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid Fontsensei if you require hosting for commercial or custom fonts, or need advanced font management features.
entry.body: Fontsensei is a free service for hosting and delivering open-source web fonts via a privacy-friendly CDN, suitable for fast and compliant font delivery.

entry.title: Fontshare
entry.description: Fontshare offers free, high-quality fonts for personal and commercial use with easy web and desktop integration.

freeTierDetails.summary: All fonts are free for personal and commercial use.

quickstartSteps: Visit https://www.fontshare.com/
Browse or search for a desired font.
Click on a font to view details and styles.
Select styles and download font files or copy web embed code.
Integrate the font into your project as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use Fontshare when you need free, high-quality fonts for web or print projects without licensing hassles.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require custom font hosting, advanced font management, or fonts outside the Fontshare catalog.
avoidIf: you require a specific non-catalog font
entry.body: Fontshare provides a curated collection of free, high-quality fonts for designers and developers, suitable for both personal and commercial projects.

entry.title: FontShift
entry.description: FontShift provides fast, privacy-friendly web font hosting with a simple API and open source fonts.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free access to open source web fonts with no account or API key required.

useCases: Add privacy-friendly fonts to static sites
Replace Google Fonts for GDPR compliance
Speed up font delivery for web apps
quickstartSteps: Browse available fonts at https://fonts.xz.style/
Copy the provided CSS <link> tag for your chosen font.
Paste the <link> tag into your website's <head> section.
Reference the font in your site's CSS using the specified font-family.
entry.whenToUse: Use FontShift when you need fast, privacy-respecting web font hosting for open source fonts without registration.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid FontShift if you require custom or commercial fonts, advanced font management, or analytics.
entry.body: FontShift is a free, privacy-first web font CDN for open source fonts, offering a simple and fast alternative to Google Fonts with no registration required.

entry.title: Google Fonts
entry.description: Google Fonts offers a large library of free, open-source web fonts for easy integration into websites and applications.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited access to all fonts and CDN delivery at no cost.
caveats: Fonts must be used per license terms

useCases: Rapid prototyping with diverse font choices
quickstartSteps: Visit https://fonts.google.com/ and browse available fonts.
Select a font and choose desired styles.
Copy the provided embed code (link or CSS import).
Paste the code into your website's HTML or CSS.
Apply the font in your site's CSS using the specified font-family.
entry.whenToUse: Use Google Fonts to quickly add high-quality, open-source fonts to your website or app with minimal setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require custom, self-hosted, or licensed commercial fonts, or need strict uptime guarantees.
entry.body: Google Fonts provides a free, easy-to-use library of open-source fonts accessible via CDN, ideal for enhancing web typography without licensing costs.

entry.title: Quidlo Timesheets
entry.description: Quidlo Timesheets offers simple, cloud-based time tracking for teams and individuals with reporting and integrations.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan for unlimited users with basic time tracking and reporting features.
caveats: Integrations and advanced features require paid plans

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Quidlo Timesheets account.
Create your first workspace and invite team members.
Add projects and tasks to organize tracked time.
Start tracking time using the web interface or mobile app.
View and export basic reports as needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use Quidlo Timesheets when you need simple, unlimited-user time tracking and basic reporting without integrations.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require integrations, advanced analytics, or billing features, as these are only available on paid plans.
entry.body: Quidlo Timesheets provides a free, easy-to-use solution for tracking time across unlimited users and projects, ideal for basic team productivity needs.

entry.title: Tldraw.com
entry.description: Tldraw.com offers a collaborative online whiteboard for sketching, diagramming, and visual collaboration in real time.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free access to the online whiteboard with real-time collaboration.
caveats: No user accounts or project management features

quickstartSteps: Visit https://tldraw.com in your browser.
Start drawing or add shapes and text on the canvas.
Share the board URL with collaborators for real-time editing.
Export your drawing as an image or SVG if needed.
entry.whenToUse: Use Tldraw.com for quick, collaborative sketching or brainstorming without setup or sign-in requirements.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need persistent storage, private boards, or advanced diagramming and project management features.
entry.body: Tldraw.com provides a free, browser-based collaborative whiteboard for instant sketching and diagramming, ideal for brainstorming and visual collaboration without sign-up.

entry.title: v0.dev
entry.description: v0.dev lets you generate React UI code from text prompts using AI.

freeTierDetails.summary: Unlimited free use for generating React UI code from prompts.
caveats: Generated code may require manual adjustment
No backend or full app generation

useCases: Generating UI code from design ideas
quickstartSteps: Go to https://v0.dev/ in your browser.
Enter a prompt describing the UI you want.
Review and copy the generated React code.
Paste the code into your React project.
entry.whenToUse: Use v0.dev when you need to quickly generate React UI code from a text description or want to prototype interfaces.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need backend logic, non-React frameworks, or highly customized production-ready code.
entry.body: v0.dev is an AI-powered tool by Vercel that generates React UI code from natural language prompts, ideal for rapid prototyping and learning.

entry.title: Vidhook
entry.description: Vidhook provides automated video generation from templates using API or Zapier integration.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes 10 video renders per month with basic features.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Vidhook account.
Create or select a video template.
Connect your workflow via API or Zapier.
Configure template variables and automation triggers.
Render and download your generated videos.
entry.whenToUse: Use Vidhook when you need to automate video creation from templates for marketing, onboarding, or notifications.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced editing, high volume rendering, or videos without watermarks on the free plan.
avoidIf: require watermark-free output on free tier
entry.body: Vidhook enables users to automate video creation from templates using API or Zapier, ideal for personalized video workflows and marketing automation.

entry.title: Wistia.com
entry.description: Wistia provides video hosting, marketing tools, and analytics for businesses to manage and share video content.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes basic video hosting with limited videos and features.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Wistia account.
Upload your first video to the dashboard.
Customize the video player as allowed.
Copy the embed code and add it to your website.
Review basic analytics in your account.
entry.whenToUse: Use Wistia when you need easy video hosting with built-in analytics and simple website embedding for marketing or business content.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require unbranded players, advanced customization, or need to host more than 10 videos without upgrading.
entry.body: Wistia offers a freemium video hosting platform with marketing tools and analytics, ideal for small teams and agencies needing branded video embeds.
